name: qtap-plugin-mcp
title: MCP Server Connector
description: Connect to MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers via SSE and expose their tools to LLMs. Supports multiple server connections with Bearer token and API key authentication.

toolConfig.description: Dynamically provides tools from connected MCP servers

configSchema.label: MCP Servers Configuration
configSchema.description: JSON array of MCP server configurations. Each server needs: name (used as tool prefix), displayName, url (SSE endpoint), authType ('none', 'bearer', 'api-key', or 'custom-header'), and enabled (boolean). Authentication fields: bearerToken (for bearer auth), apiKey and apiKeyHeader (for api-key auth), customHeaders as JSON (for custom-header auth).

configSchema.label: Tool Discovery Timeout (seconds)
configSchema.description: Maximum time to wait when discovering tools from MCP servers

configSchema.label: Auto-Reconnect
configSchema.description: Automatically reconnect to MCP servers if connection is lost

configSchema.label: Max Reconnect Attempts
configSchema.description: Maximum number of reconnection attempts before giving up (0 = unlimited)
